    C

    com.example.milestone - package com.example.milestone
     
    com.example.milestone.business - package com.example.milestone.business

    com.example.milestone.controllers - package com.example.milestone.controllers
     
    com.example.milestone.models - package com.example.milestone.models

    com.example.milestone.services - package com.example.milestone.services
     
    createProduct(Product, BindingResult, Authentication) - Method in class com.example.milestone.controllers.ProductController
    Creates a new product through JSON API If success, product is saved to database for current user.
    createProductPage(Model) - Method in class com.example.milestone.controllers.ProductController
    Displays product creation page.
    createProductSubmit(Product, BindingResult, Model, Authentication) - Method in class com.example.milestone.controllers.ProductController
    Handles submission of product creation form.
    CustomUserDetailsService - Class in com.example.milestone.business
    Retrieves user details from the database for Spring Security.
    CustomUserDetailsService(UserRepository) - Constructor for class com.example.milestone.business.CustomUserDetailsService
    Creates a CustomUserDetailsService for accessing repository.
